bodyPositive: Well I thought I had given up soda in my life... It had been years since really drinking soda on a regular basis and then one day (at a lovely party) I indulged in a vintage cola from Olipop and dang it, I loved it! My biggest issue is that they are still a little too sweet for me but thats why I love the mini cans. Price is a touch high but that helps limit me from drinking them too often. Cherry Cola, Vintage Cola, and Root Bear are the favs in our house

I really wanted to love OLIPOP because I genuinely appreciate the mission, supporting digestive health with prebiotics, botanicals, and plant fiber is a strong concept. I also love that it offers a soda alternative with better-for-you ingredients and thoughtful branding. That said, the taste didn’t work for me. I tried multiple flavors and found them a bit overly sweet with a slightly artificial aftertaste. If the flavor profile felt more natural and less sweet, I would absolutely give it another try.

We don't really drink soda, but my boyfriend enjoys cream soda, and he liked the Olipop version. I wish that it didn't use Stevia, but I understand the appeal of a low sugar option that's better than soda.

Love this flavor. It’s light and very apple forward without being sweet. Lots of bubbles, and love the addition of probiotics and fiber. Some flavors are hit and miss of olipop but I think this is a versatile flavor that I won’t get sick of.

I really enjoy the crisp apple if you’re a fan of a nonalcoholic cider. I also enjoy the fact that it is caffeine free because I feel like I always have a craving for something sweet at night and it always hits the spot.

Crisp Apple is their best flavor, hands down. I love the health benefits. I have Mast Cell Activation Syndrome, but this is gentle enough that it doesn't upset my tummy or cause a flare. Plus... it's just yummy! Worth a try.

The only Olipop flavor I like is the Cherry Cola. It tastes like a Cherry Coke for the most part and definitely fulfills my cravings for it! Other than that, the new Shirley Temple was over-hyped in my opinion, and just NOT it. I don't think it tastes like a Shirley Temple.

I love the variety of flavors that is offered by Olipop. They taste sweet but not overly so, and is a great alternative to regular soda. My favorites are the vintage cola, lime, and cherry flavor. The only downside is it is a bit expensive.

Everytime I walk into a grocery store, I will grab an olipop. The flavor is unmatched and I taste healthier. As someone who was strictly a regular Coke/pepsi drinker, this was such a good alternative as it’s way less sugar and even more fiber. My go to is the cream soda flavor, but the vintage cola taste just as good. I highly recommend olipops to anyone who considers themselves a soda drinker or even in need of a sweet treat.
This is my FAVORITE olipop flavor. I think this brand is way better than Poppi. I will always keep this flavor in my fridge. 10/10

The Orange Cream Olipop is honestly one of the best sodas I’ve tried. It tastes like a classic orange creamsicle but isn’t overly sweet, and I love that it has way better ingredients than regular soda. Definitely keeping these stocked.
These do not taste good at all.
I absolutely love this flavor in the olli pops! I’m a huge fan of anything cream soda, and this definitely tops the list for me! It’s not super sweet, but also does not taste “too healthy”!
This flavor was surprisingly tasty and refreshing!!!

So far i havent met an Olipop flavour i didn't like. Im dubious as to the claims in relation to gut health, but i like the flavours so i'll occasionally pick one up at wholefoods. I don't drink soda but sometimes i like a not to sweet fizzy drink and this is perfect for me.

I dislike the taste of artificial sweetener and was hoping it was going to be masked by the flavour. I love that there are so many flavours to try and the marketing is amazing. I wouldn't buy again because I don't love soda, but I love their mission.

They are tooooo sweet for me! I think the flavors are fun and the packaging rocks but, at the end of the day, it's too much and can be overwhelming. Im sure it's great if you are trying to replace actual soda but it's a no from me.

This olipop takes me right back to my childhood drinking way too much cream soda. Although, this one is definitely better gut health wise and still tasty! Olipop is definitely my go-to prebiotic bevvy of choice and can usually find on sale at my local grocer or 2 for $4 deal which is great! also love classic root beer, can't go wrong with that one!

These natural flavored sodas are a nice departure from your traditional flavors. I enjoyed both the crisp apple, which reminded me of Martinellie’s (if less sweet), and the watermelon lime, which tasted as named.

I love Olipop I love their packaging. I think they have the cutest packaging. And their drinks are so delicious perfect amount of flavor and sweetness and fizz/carbonation. I think this is my favorite brand of “healthy soda”

The crisp apple is probably my favorite thing to drink year round and is not just for fall- but when I do have it in the fall I literally pair it with my Olipop hoodie when I go on my walks and I'm literally known as the olipop girl.

Crisp Apple is one of the best flavors of Olipop. It has a nice fizz, tastes like a “grown up” apple juice, and is not cloyingly sweet. I like that there’s benefits to drinking this over a more sugary soda, such as the lower sugar content and some dietary fiber. I’m glad that this flavor is now a regular one, not just seasonal.

Never tried this before but always open to trying something new. I was intrigued by the crisp apple flavor and prebiotic. And here's my honest truth, I was not a big fan of this. It didn't taste like an apple but more like an overly sugary sweet soda. It was refreshing after being refrigerated but can I say I'd be purchasing more- Probably not. I love that it has 9g of fiber but not the amount of sugar (added). I am not sure it's for me.

I really enjoy their orange cream flavor. It isn’t sickeningly sweet like a lot of brands but you still get that nice smooth taste you’re looking for. Always appreciate not feeling like I’m drowning my body in sugars if I just want a treat.

I love the variation that Olipop has with their flavors. It’s what really sticks out to me the most when it comes to prebiotic sodas. I love that it’s gut healthy and lives up to that. Highly recommend.

I love the classic grape flavor of Olipop! It has such a great nostalgic taste that reminds me of grape juice I’d have as a kid. It’s also so refreshing and great lunch beverage! Olipop in general has a great amount of carbonation that is not overpowering.
I have to say they’re good but not my favorite! My husband is obsessed and I’ll have one every once in a while, but the taste is not totally for me!

My favorite soda alternative by far (and I don’t even like “real soda”). The flavors are all delicious, the carbonation level is just right, and the company feels value-driven and trustworthy. Love love!!

I always have a few cans of OLIPOP chilling in my fridge — Root Beer, Apple Crisp, and Ginger Ale are my go-tos. They’re basically the upgraded version of soda: bubbly, flavorful, and actually good for your gut. Each can’s packed with prebiotics, botanicals, and plant fiber that support digestion, which is cool if you’re trying to sneak in something healthy without giving up the fizz.

Yeah, they’re a little pricey for “soda,” but I look at it like paying for the the benefits. Most grocery stores carry them now, and once you find your favorite flavor, you’ll get why people are obsessed. If you’re into gut health or just want a guilt-free fizzy fix, OLIPOP is absolutely worth the hype.

The first brand to get me hooked on alternative soda - I've never been a big soda drinker because I care about my health and try to avoid the nasty chemicals, but every now and then it's fun to have a bubbly treat. I feel no guilt now when grabbing a dr goodwin, orange, or vintage cola (my favorite olippp flavors) and when we host friends we throw them in a cooler and they love trying them too

I have tried most or maybe all of their flavors. I don't keep track of their new releases. However, I am not very fond of a lot of their flavors. I think the flavors aren't very prominent. They don't taste good to me. I want to like them, but it is just not for me.

I really like these sodas! For the most part they taste good and are "better" for you than the products they're designed to replace. However, some flavors taste nothing like they're supposed to.  Additionally, they cost a lot for what they are (though I can usually find a sale).
Vintage Cola is good. Great, even. Now I just need to find and try every other flavor so I can feel a sense of completion.

I really wanted to love Olipop because the concept is great, but the flavors just didn’t do it for me. I found them a bit artificial and not as refreshing as I hoped. I much prefer the taste of some of their competitors, which feel smoother and more enjoyable to drink. I appreciate what Olipop is trying to do health-wise, but for me, flavor is key and this one missed the mark.

They are great as a soda alternative but more so a treat than something I drink often. The flavors are fun and it’s nice that there is always something new to try if I want to branch out with something to drink with dinner.

Minha experiência com a Maçã Crocante foi muito positiva. O sabor é realmente gostoso, equilibrado e entrega bem a proposta de ser um snack prático para o dia a dia. A textura é crocante na medida certa e transmite frescor, o que torna o consumo ainda mais agradável. Como criadora de conteúdo UGC, costumo observar também a apresentação e a experiência como um todo, e achei a embalagem bem pensada e funcional, além de transmitir cuidado com a proposta do produto. É uma opção interessante para quem busca praticidade sem abrir mão do sabor. Como ponto de melhoria, acredito que poderiam ampliar a variedade de sabores. No geral, fiquei satisfeita e recomendo.

Olipop has become a regular staple in my house, and while it’s not a perfect one-to-one replacement for traditional soda, it comes impressively close, especially with the classic cola flavors. I’ve always been a cola person, and most “better for you” alternatives miss the mark, but Olipop’s version hits the right notes without the syrupy aftertaste. It still feels like a treat, just a lighter, smoother, more balanced take.
I also have to mention the Crisp Apple flavor, which I love for reasons that go beyond taste. It reminds me of when I was a kid and my mom would make me her own version of “soda” by blending apple juice with sparkling water. There’s something nostalgic and comforting about taking that first sip. It feels like a grown-up version of a childhood ritual.
One of the reasons I keep buying Olipop is that I feel good about letting my teen drink it. The low sugar and added prebiotics make it a far better choice than traditional soda, and it satisfies the craving without the sugar crash. It’s a rare win-win.
It’s not quite a five-star product only because the price adds up, but for us, it’s absolutely worth keeping stocked.

These are ok... I wanted to like them so badly, and thought they might be great for an occasional treat (I don't drink soda often). The flavors are not bad- but they all have that aspertane feel when I drink them that turns me off of them. I've given a few flavors a try and always end up with the same fake sweet taste and coating on my tongue to not want to try again. If they ever fix that, I'll happily give a shot again but it's a dealbreaker.

I'm a girl who's in a complicated relationship with her gut... and a vice for soda. Olipop is super available to me via my local grocery and corner stores in San Francisco, so I've gotten to try a few flavors! I enjoy the vintage cola and apple flavors. I do think it has it's own little flavor, almost like a a bubblegum-y aftertaste. It's not super distracting, and neither does it linger on your tongue. Good for a snack and I feel way less guilty about picking this up than a big name-brand soda!

My whole family has switched from regular soda to Olipop, and Lemon Lime is our favorite. It’s light, bubbly and so refreshing. And I feel way better about letting the kids drink it. Makes it feel like a smart choice !

The "pop" of the tab and that initial scent? Absolute magic. My senses were fully awakened and I was ready to fall in love. Sadly, it was all downhill from there. While the aroma is a solid 5/5, the flavor just didn't hit the way I expected it to. I’m all for healthy alternatives, but I couldn't even finish this one. I’ll be sticking to my Poppi.

My college age girls are home from college and this is what they requested! It’s magic and the probiotics are so good for their tummies. Delish drink, clean ingredients and super flavor! I keep picking up more!

I really liked all the flavors is so natural and tasty.. I recommended this brand a lot … it’s for me like 20/10 you will not regrets when you tried and you’ll want to taste all one of them … so enjoy

I was really surprised by the Pineapple flavor and enjoyed it. I hope it will be a permanent addition to the brand. Olipop sodas always taste great and are refreshing and you don't have to worry about the ingredients.

Daughter loves this as she feels it is a much healthier soda alternatives. She is a nurse with. Major sweet tooth and enjoys soda but prefers and better health alternative. She typically purchases at target.

fun and unique flavors but don’t expect any gut benefits. better off taking a probiotic but they are a yummy healthier option if you are looking to ditch high sugar sodas!! love the apple flavor i’ve never had anything like it

This is the literal most delicious soda pop to ever walk the planet. I'm SO hooked on orange cream and so so happy they brought it back!!!! Way to go Olipop, you're the realest. Thanks for making the soda world a happier + cleaner place.

Absolutely love these drinks. Amazing flavors like crisp apple and vintage cola. I love the idea behind healthy soda and this hits all the marks from a macro standpoint. The mini cans are amazing and I wish they had them in more flavors.

I’m hooked on Olie Soda — light, crisp, and perfectly balanced without being overly sweet. You can actually taste the clean ingredients, and it feels like a treat that’s good for you. I’ve started swapping it in for my dinner drink — it gives that same satisfying “ahhh” moment but leaves me hydrated. A total everyday luxury.

I started drinking OLIPOP as a healthier alternative to regular soda, and it was the best choice! We love all the different flavors, and it’s even helped with our gut health. Low in calories and very tasty.
